tools.name: search_archive_imagery
tools.description: Search SkyWatch satellite imagery archive. Returns results with Explore links, per-product pricing ($/km² and total), and cloud cover. Use mode parameter: "search" (default, top 50 results), "time_series" (best image per year/quarter/month — set interval and wide date range), "compare_providers" (best per provider), "budget" (free and cheapest options). Show each result individually. If 0 results: increase max_cloud_cover, expand date range, or increase radius_km.

tools.name: calculate_pricing
tools.description: Estimate cost for satellite imagery by resolution tier. For accurate per-product prices, use search_archive_imagery — search results include exact $/km² and total for each image.

tools.name: get_satellites
tools.description: List available satellites with capabilities, resolution, revisit time, and coverage.

tools.name: get_offerings
tools.description: Browse satellite imagery products with pricing tiers. Filter by resolution, provider, or category.
